case_number: constitutional petition is dismissed as not

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, LARKANA C.P. No.D-473 of 2013. DATE OF HEARING ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF HON’BLE JUDGE 1. For hearing of M.A.No.6645/2013. 2. For hearing of M.A.No.2473/2013. 3. For hearing M.A.No.2235/2013. 4. For hearing of main case. 01.03.2022. Mr. Safdar Ali Ghouri, advocate for the petitioners. Mr. Abdul Hamid Bhurgri, Addl. A. G. -.-.-.-.-.-.- At the very outset, it is stated by the learned counsel for the petitioners that certain petitioners have joined other job, therefore, under instructions, he does not press instant constitutional petition, provided the petitioners who are still working with PPHI Sindh are permitted to file their petition afresh on event of need. In view of above, the instant constitutional petition is dismissed as not pressed. The petitioners, who are intending to file the fresh petition, may file the same, if it is permitted by law. JUDGE JUDGE
